title: Add panic-recovery tests for VT mutex goroutine sites
description:
Follow-up from h2-reviewer review of f26484f. The defer unlock + recover patterns are in place but lack targeted tests asserting the panic-recovery behavior.

Add tests for these goroutine sites:
- ReadInput: inject a panicking handler, verify goroutine survives and continues reading input
- client.TickStatus: inject a panicking RenderStatusBar, verify ticker keeps ticking
- WatchResize: inject a panicking Resize/Render, verify handler keeps handling signals
- Session.TickStatus: same as client.TickStatus but at session level with ForEachClient
- OnDeliver (daemon + interactive): inject a panicking RenderStatusBar via ForEachClient, verify delivery goroutine survives

Use the existing attach_test.go panic recovery test (from commit 3b69677) as a pattern reference.

Non-blocking hardening/test-harness work. The core fix (f26484f) is reviewed and approved.
